'''Klaus Janson''' is an artist that worked on ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] in the late 1970s to early 1980s when [[Marvel Comics]] held the comic book license. He inked most of the [[The Kingdom of Ice|''War on Ice'']] / [[The Kingdom of Ice|''Kingdom of Ice'']] story arc, and appeared in [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 3]] as inker, penciller and colorist in addition to providing that issue's cover.

Janson is mostly associated outside of Star Wars with his time on [[Wikipedia: Daredevil (Marvel Comics)|''Daredevil'']] and [[Wikipedia: Batman|''Batman'']] in collaboration with [[Frank Miller]].
